message:
chore(beads): update bd-3ta.2 S3-FIFO buffer pool eviction to in_progress

- Status change from open → in_progress for the S3-FIFO buffer pool
  eviction bead (bd-3ta.2), reflecting active implementation work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -890,7 +890,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-3t3.9.4","title":"§5.6.4.10 SSI Witness Plane: Deterministic Verification Gates","description":"E2E Test:
- test_e2e_bd_3t3_9_4_compliance: concrete E2E identifier for structure lint compliance.

Split from bd-3t3.9 which collapsed all 10 subsections of §5.6.4 into a single bead.

Covers spec lines ~8005-8011 (§5.6.4.10).

## §5.6.4.10 Deterministic Verification Gates (Required)

The witness plane MUST be verified under cancellation/crash/loss using asupersync LabRuntime:
- Deterministic scenarios: §17.4.1
- No-false-negatives property tests: §17.4.2

This is the capstone verification subsection that composes all witness plane components (§5.6.4.1-5.6.4.9) into a comprehensive test regime ensuring correctness under adversarial conditions.

## Key Verification Dimensions

1. **Cancellation resilience:** Every .await point in publication protocol (§5.6.4.7) must be cancellation-safe. LabRuntime injects cancellation at every such point and verifies no witness data is lost or corrupted.

2. **Crash resilience:** Process crash at any instruction boundary must not violate the no-false-negatives invariant (§5.6.4.1). LabRuntime simulates crashes during:
   - Hot plane updates (bit-setting in HotWitnessBucketEntry)
   - Cold plane publication (reserve/write/commit phases)
   - Epoch advancement and bucket refresh
   - GC compaction/pruning

3. **Symbol loss resilience:** RaptorQ decoding MUST reconstruct missing witness symbols within tolerance. LabRuntime simulates symbol loss patterns and verifies:
   - Cold plane objects (ReadWitness, WriteWitness, DependencyEdge, CommitProof) survive configured loss rates
   - Explicit "durability contract violated" diagnostic when loss exceeds tolerance

4. **End-to-end SSI validation:** Complete pipeline test:
   - Concurrent transactions generate witnesses (§5.6.4.3)
   - Hot plane discovers candidates (§5.6.4.5)
   - Cold plane persists evidence (§5.6.4.6)
   - Publication is crash-safe (§5.6.4.7)
   - GC does not prune needed evidence (§5.6.4.8)
   - Distributed replay reaches same verdict (§5.6.4.9)

## Unit Test Requirements

1. test_e2e_witness_plane_end_to_end: Run concurrent transactions that generate witnesses. Verify witness publication, lookup, and SSI usage works through full stack.
2. test_deterministic_scenario_17_4_1: All deterministic scenarios from §17.4.1 pass under LabRuntime
3. test_no_false_negatives_property_17_4_2: Property tests from §17.4.2 pass for all WitnessKey variants
4. test_ssi_validation_no_dangerous_structure: Disjoint read/write sets commit successfully
5. test_ssi_validation_dangerous_structure_aborts_pivot: T_pivot with both incoming/outgoing rw-antideps aborted at commit
6. test_ssi_validation_one_direction_ok: has_out_rw=true but has_in_rw=false commits successfully
7. test_ssi_false_positive_rate_bounded: False positive abort rate <= INV-SSI-FP threshold under representative workload
8. test_cancellation_at_every_await_point: LabRuntime cancellation injection at all await points
9. test_crash_at_every_instruction_boundary: LabRuntime crash injection during witness operations
10. test_symbol_loss_within_tolerance: Witness objects reconstructable under configured symbol loss
11. test_symbol_loss_exceeds_tolerance_diagnostic: Explicit diagnostic when loss exceeds tolerance
12. prop_ssi_no_false_negatives: For any serialization anomaly (write skew, read-only anomaly), witness plane detects it

## Acceptance Criteria
- Deterministic LabRuntime scenarios (§17.4.1) and no-false-negatives property tests (§17.4.2) are implemented and passing.
- Cancellation/crash/loss injection coverage is comprehensive (every await / boundary point under the witness plane paths).
- Failures produce a minimal repro bundle (seed + injection point + trace excerpt + violated invariant).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-08T07:44:36.149851638Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-09T21:30:05.379425094Z","closed_at":"2026-02-09T21:30:05.379404606Z","close_reason":"Deterministic verification-gates compliance suite implemented and validated","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-1if1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:00Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3t3.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:00Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2653,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Logging Requirements

- INFO: verification run envelope: `scenario_id`, `seed`, `mode` (cancel|crash|loss), `injections`, `duration_ms`.
- DEBUG (opt-in): witness-plane event trace with stable event IDs suitable for diffing.
- ERROR: on any gate failure, emit a minimal repro bundle: (seed, injection point, trace excerpt, and the violated invariant).

Test harness expectations:
- Every failure must be reproducible via a single command that replays the seed + injection config.
","created_at":"2026-02-08T07:52:54Z"},{"id":2654,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Logging Requirements

Verification gates must produce forensics-grade logs to explain any SSI verdict.

- Always include: `trace_id`, `scenario_id`, `seed`, `schedule_fingerprint`, `loss_profile`.
- Verdict fields: `txn_id`, `commit_seq`, `has_in_rw`, `has_out_rw`, `dangerous_structure`, `abort_reason`.
- Evidence pointers: `commit_marker_id`, `commit_proof_id`, `dependency_edge_ids`, `witness_object_ids`, `decode_proof_id`.
- Fault injection: `injection_point`, `cancel_reason`, `crash_site`.

On failure, emit an artifact bundle directory containing:
- the structured log excerpt,
- a deterministic replay capsule,
- and all evidence object IDs needed to re-run validation.
","created_at":"2026-02-08T07:56:44Z"},{"id":2655,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## E2E Test (Deterministic Gates)

- **test_e2e_witness_plane_deterministic_gates** (LabRuntime):
  - Assemble a minimal witness-plane pipeline that exercises §5.6.4.1–§5.6.4.9 components together:
    - WitnessKey generation (semantic + sub-page keys)
    - Hot-plane reader bits and cold-plane bucket evidence
    - Publication protocol (marker/proof publication) and GC hooks
    - Distributed-mode loss profiles (simulated)
  - Run the same logical scenario across three fault modes:
    - `mode=cancel`: inject cancellation at **every** `.await` point in the publication protocol; assert no partial publication and no orphaned evidence.
    - `mode=crash`: inject crash faults at each critical boundary (pre/post marker append, pre/post witness publish, mid-bucket update); assert recovery leaves the witness plane in a verifiable state.
    - `mode=loss`: inject symbol/object loss per the configured loss profile; assert gates either (a) still verify, or (b) fail with a forensics-grade repro bundle.
  - Determinism requirements:
    - Same `seed` and same injection index produce identical `schedule_fingerprint` and identical event trace hashes.

The pass/fail signal for this test is the gate verdict itself: every failure MUST be explainable via logs (seed + injection + trace excerpt + violated invariant).
","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:12:38Z"},{"id":2656,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA

- [ ] Dangerous structure detection: pivot rule (has_in_rw AND has_out_rw => abort) correctly identifies potential serialization cycles
- [ ] T3 rule: for committed pivot R in X -rw-> R -rw-> T, abort T if R has has_in_rw
- [ ] Conservative overapproximation justified: L_miss/L_fp = 1000:1 ratio
- [ ] SSI false positive rate monitored via e-process (INV-SSI-FP): null hypothesis p_fp <= 5%, lambda=0.3, alpha=0.01
- [ ] Read-only transactions exempt from SSI validation (zero overhead, zero aborts)
- [ ] Verification gates run deterministic multi-transaction schedules and validate all SSI decisions match spec
- [ ] Conformal calibration: 95% confidence band on page-level overhead vs row-level
","created_at":"2026-02-08T09:52:35Z"},{"id":2657,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Unit Test Requirements
- test_bd_3t3_9_4_unit_compliance_gate: verify section-specific unit validation hooks are wired.
- prop_bd_3t3_9_4_structure_compliance: property check that required structure blocks are present.

## E2E Test
- test_e2e_bd_3t3_9_4_compliance: run end-to-end scenario proving this bead's path with deterministic artifact capture.

## Logging Requirements
- DEBUG: emit stage-level progress and key branch decisions for this bead scope.
- INFO: emit summary counters and completion status for this bead scope.
- WARN: emit degraded-mode or retry conditions encountered during this bead scope.
- ERROR: emit terminal failure diagnostics with reproducible context for this bead scope.
- Reference: bd-1fpm structured repro-bundle logging conventions.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit test identifiers for this bead are concrete and executable.
- [ ] E2E identifier for this bead is concrete and executable.
- [ ] Logging requirements include DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR and bd-1fpm alignment.","created_at":"2026-02-09T03:10:16Z"},{"id":2658,"issue_id":"bd-3t3.9.4","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"RainyBay implementation update for `bd-3t3.9.4` deterministic verification-gates lane.

Delivered:
- Added `crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_3t3_9_4_ssi_witness_plane_deterministic_verification_gates_compliance.rs`.
- Implemented required identifiers and scenarios in this compliance suite:
  - `test_e2e_witness_plane_end_to_end`
  - `test_deterministic_scenario_17_4_1`
  - `test_no_false_negatives_property_17_4_2`
  - `test_ssi_validation_no_dangerous_structure`
  - `test_ssi_validation_dangerous_structure_aborts_pivot`
  - `test_ssi_validation_one_direction_ok`
  - `test_ssi_false_positive_rate_bounded`
  - `test_cancellation_at_every_await_point`
  - `test_crash_at_every_instruction_boundary`
  - `test_symbol_loss_within_tolerance`
  - `test_symbol_loss_exceeds_tolerance_diagnostic`
  - `prop_ssi_no_false_negatives`
  - `test_bd_3t3_9_4_unit_compliance_gate`
  - `prop_bd_3t3_9_4_structure_compliance`
  - `test_e2e_bd_3t3_9_4_compliance`
  - `test_e2e_bd_3t3_9_4`
- Emits required DEBUG/INFO/WARN logging and references `bd-1fpm`.
- Writes deterministic E2E artifact under `target/bd_3t3_9_4_runtime/.../bd_3t3_9_4_deterministic_suite.json`.

Validation evidence:
- `cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_3t3_9_4_ssi_witness_plane_deterministic_verification_gates_compliance -- --nocapture` ✅
- `cargo clippy -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_3t3_9_4_ssi_witness_plane_deterministic_verification_gates_compliance -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo fmt -p fsqlite-harness -- --check` ✅

Workspace-wide status note:
- `cargo fmt --check` is currently failing due unrelated concurrent edits in `crates/fsqlite-harness/tests/bd_3uoj_isomorphism_proof_template_compliance.rs` outside this lane.
","created_at":"2026-02-09T21:29:59Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ta","title":"Epic: B-Tree & Buffer Pool","description":"B-tree storage engine: page management, overflow pages, free-list, LeanStore pointer swizzling (§15.3) for buffer hot-path. S3-FIFO eviction for buffer pool (§15.1). Swiss Tables for index lookups (§7.7). Bε-tree option for write-optimized indexes (§15.2).

## Success Criteria
Epic completion requires all child beads to satisfy their structured acceptance criteria, including explicit unit/property coverage, deterministic e2e evidence, and structured logging/metrics validation.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every child bead in this epic defines concrete unit/property test scope with deterministic pass/fail thresholds and invariant IDs. 2. Critical-path end-to-end scenarios are implemented as reproducible e2e scripts (fixed seeds, replay commands, artifact bundles) across happy-path and adversarial-path behavior. 3. Structured logging and metrics contracts are mandatory for all child outputs (trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing, outcome, error context) and validated by CI conformance checks. 4. Epic completion requires a machine-readable evidence manifest linking child unit/e2e/log artifacts to acceptance outcomes, plus an explicit fallback/rollback plan that preserves concurrent-writer defaults.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:58:00.410962363Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:07.835707257Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","btree","epic","ev-gated","frankensqlite","storage"]}
 {"id":"bd-3ta.1","title":"B-tree core: node format, split/merge, overflow","description":"B-tree implementation: Interior/leaf node format, cell encoding, overflow pages, free-list management. Variable-length key support. Page split/merge with rebalancing. Tracing: span 'btree_op' with fields op_type(seek/insert/delete), pages_visited, splits, merges. Log level: DEBUG per-operation, TRACE per-page. Metric: fsqlite_btree_operations_total counter by op_type, fsqlite_btree_page_splits_total counter, fsqlite_btree_depth gauge.","acceptance_criteria":"1. B-tree invariants maintained after 100K random operations. 2. Page utilization > 50% average. 3. Split/merge correct for all cell sizes. 4. Free-list has zero page leaks.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:55.460464526Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T18:39:34.321948422Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T18:39:34.321919978Z","close_reason":"Completed B-tree observability span/metrics implementation with passing fsqlite-btree test+clippy validation.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["btree","frankensqlite","impl","storage"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.1","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2953,"issue_id":"bd-3ta.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Completed observability contract for B-tree core. Added new module crates/fsqlite-btree/src/instrumentation.rs exposing fsqlite_btree_operations_total (seek/insert/delete), fsqlite_btree_page_splits_total, and fsqlite_btree_depth snapshot/reset APIs. Wired cursor hot paths to emit DEBUG span btree_op with fields op_type/pages_visited/splits/merges and TRACE per-page visit logs. Added tests: cursor::test_btree_observability_operation_totals, cursor::test_btree_observability_split_counter_and_depth_gauge, instrumentation::metrics_snapshot_tracks_operation_buckets. Validation: cargo +nightly test -p fsqlite-btree (137 passed), cargo +nightly clippy -p fsqlite-btree --all-targets -- -D warnings (pass), cargo +nightly check --all-targets (workspace pass). Workspace clippy/fmt remain blocked by unrelated baseline files outside this slice.","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:39:31Z"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3ta.2","title":"S3-FIFO buffer pool eviction","description":"S3-FIFO buffer pool eviction (§15.1): Three-queue FIFO eviction (small/main/ghost). Lock-free queue implementation. Adaptive sizing between queues. Replaces traditional LRU/clock. Tracing: span 'buffer_evict' with fields queue(small/main/ghost), evicted_page, hit_rate_1min. Log level: DEBUG eviction decisions, INFO periodic hit rate. Metric: fsqlite_buffer_hit_ratio gauge, fsqlite_buffer_evictions_total counter by queue, fsqlite_buffer_pool_size_pages gauge.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Hit rate >= LRU on all YCSB workloads. 2. Lock-free queue operations. 3. Adaptive queue sizing converges within 1000 accesses. 4. Memory bounded by configured pool size.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:55.516027002Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:06.521837695Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","btree","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.2","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"bd-3ta.3","title":"LeanStore pointer swizzling for buffer hot-path","description":"LeanStore pointer swizzling (§15.3): In-memory page references use direct pointers instead of page IDs. Swizzle on page load, unswizzle on eviction. Eliminates page-table indirection on hot path. Tracing: span 'swizzle' with fields page_id, swizzled_in, unswizzled_out. Log level: TRACE swizzle events, DEBUG periodic swizzle ratio. Metric: fsqlite_swizzle_ratio gauge, fsqlite_swizzle_faults_total counter.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Pointer swizzling eliminates page-table lookup on hot path. 2. 2-5x improvement on random point lookups. 3. Correct under concurrent access + eviction. 4. Unswizzle on eviction is safe.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:55.570092334Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:06.431397848Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","btree","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.3","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ta.4","title":"Bε-tree write-optimized index option","description":"Bepsilon-tree option (§15.2): Write-optimized tree with message buffers at interior nodes. Batch small writes, flush down on buffer overflow. Configurable epsilon parameter for read/write tradeoff. For write-heavy workloads. Tracing: span 'be_flush' with fields node_id, messages_flushed, cascade_depth. Log level: DEBUG flush events, INFO periodic write amplification stats. Metric: fsqlite_betree_write_amplification gauge, fsqlite_betree_buffer_utilization gauge.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Bε-tree write throughput > 2x B-tree for sequential inserts. 2. Read amplification bounded by epsilon parameter. 3. Flush cascade correct under concurrent reads. 4. Configurable epsilon with clear performance tradeoff documentation.  8. Unit/property test coverage for this bead is mandatory, including deterministic seeds and explicit invariant checks. 9. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script must validate integrated behavior with replay instructions and archived artifacts. 10. Structured logging/metrics validation is required: trace/run/scenario IDs, timing, counters, and actionable failure context must be present and CI-verified.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:55.625042813Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:13.408549430Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","alien-pass-2026-02-13","btree","ev-gated","frankensqlite","impl"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.4","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-3ta.5","title":"TEST: B-tree invariants, S3-FIFO hit rate, swizzle correctness","description":"Test bead: B-tree & buffer pool correctness. (1) B-tree invariants: verify sorted order, balance, page utilization after random insert/delete sequences (100K ops). (2) S3-FIFO: compare hit rate against LRU/CLOCK on YCSB workloads A-F. Target: S3-FIFO >= LRU on all workloads. (3) Pointer swizzling: verify correctness under concurrent access with eviction. (4) Overflow pages: insert rows > page size, verify retrieval. (5) Free-list: verify no page leaks after mixed insert/delete. Acceptance: zero invariant violations, S3-FIFO hit rate >= LRU on scan-heavy workloads.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Zero B-tree invariant violations after 100K ops. 2. S3-FIFO hit rate >= LRU on scan-heavy workloads. 3. Pointer swizzle correct under concurrent eviction. 4. Zero page leaks in free-list.  5. Comprehensive unit/property tests with deterministic seeds and invariant checks are required for this bead. 6. At least one deterministic end-to-end scenario script validates integrated behavior with replay instructions and artifact capture. 7. Structured logging/metrics must emit trace/run/scenario identifiers, timing, and actionable failure context, and CI must validate schema conformance.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:55.679543650Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:06.331756559Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","btree","ev-gated","frankensqlite","test"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-3ta.5","depends_on_id":"bd-3ta.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:23:01Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
